cloud_foundation.description: Auto-scaled cloud foundation profile for staged calibration plus chemistry and world-generation search.

cloud_staged.description: Auto-scaled cloud profile focused on staged Optuna optimization over the canonical runtime surface.

cloud_chemistry.description: Auto-scaled cloud profile focused on GPU chemistry-property search.

cloud_worldgen.description: Auto-scaled cloud profile focused on canonical world-generation calibration.

cloud_legacy_fast.description: Compatibility profile using the legacy cloud runner with the shared contract.

a100_foundation.description: Legacy alias for the older A100 foundation profile; preserved for compatibility.

a100_staged.description: Legacy alias for the older A100 staged profile; preserved for compatibility.

a100_chemistry.description: Legacy alias for the older A100 chemistry profile; preserved for compatibility.

a100_worldgen.description: Legacy alias for the older A100 world-generation profile; preserved for compatibility.

vm_legacy_fast.description: Legacy alias for the older compatibility cloud runner profile.
